tasks.title: Fix Config Crate Empty Re-export
tasks.description: Move config parsing logic from crates/core/src/config.rs to dedicated crates/config/ crate. Currently crates/config/src/lib.rs is an empty re-export that violates PRD 19 crate ownership architecture. Must maintain all existing functionality including JSON/JSONC parsing, variable expansion, and precedence order.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify config precedence CLI overrides env works
AddUnitTest: verify config precedence env overrides file works
AddUnitTest: verify config precedence full chain integration works
AddUnitTest: verify variable expansion from environment works
AddUnitTest: verify JSON/JSONC parsing works correctly
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-config to verify all config tests pass
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-core -- config to verify core config tests pass
AddRegressionTest: ensure all imports from config crate still work after refactor
tasks.impl_notes: Move config.rs from core to config crate. Update all imports across codebase. Ensure backward compatibility for config loading functions.

tasks.title: Fix Config Tests PoisonError in Parallel Runs
tasks.description: 10 config tests fail with PoisonError when run in parallel due to shared ENV_LOCK mutex state. Tests affected: test_precedence_cli_none_values_dont_override_env, test_precedence_cli_overrides_env, test_precedence_env_config_content_overrides_file, test_precedence_env_overrides_config_file, test_precedence_full_chain_integration, test_precedence_multiple_env_vars_stack, test_precedence_opencode_dir_overrides_project, test_precedence_project_config_overrides_global, test_precedence_provider_api_keys_from_env, test_load_multi_with_cli_overrides_full_chain
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_cli_none_values_dont_override_env passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_cli_overrides_env passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_env_config_content_overrides_file passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_env_overrides_config_file passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_full_chain_integration passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_multiple_env_vars_stack passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_opencode_dir_overrides_project passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_project_config_overrides_global passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_precedence_provider_api_keys_from_env passes
AddUnitTest: verify test_load_multi_with_cli_overrides_full_chain passes
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-core -- config to verify all 10 tests pass
AddRegressionTest: ensure tests pass when run with cargo test -- --test-threads=4
tasks.impl_notes: Refactor ENV_LOCK to use proper async Mutex or remove shared state. Ensure tests can run in parallel without race conditions.

tasks.title: Fix TUI Keybinding Case Sensitivity Test
tasks.description: Test keybinding::tests::test_key_parsing_simple fails with assertion failure comparing Char('P') to Char('p'). Fix case sensitivity handling in key parsing.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify test_key_parsing_simple passes - Char('P') case sensitivity
AddRegressionTest: ensure other key parsing tests still pass
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-tui -- keybinding
tasks.impl_notes: Fix case sensitivity handling in key parsing logic in crates/tui/src/keybinding.rs

tasks.title: Fix TUI Keybinding Space Key Test
tasks.description: Test keybinding::tests::test_key_parsing_space fails with assertion failure comparing Char(' ') to Space. Fix Space vs Char(' ') handling in key parsing.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify test_key_parsing_space passes - Space vs Char(' ') handling
AddRegressionTest: ensure other key parsing tests still pass
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-tui -- keybinding
tasks.impl_notes: Fix Space vs Char(' ') handling in key parsing logic in crates/tui/src/keybinding.rs

tasks.title: Fix TUI Theme Hex Color Parsing Test
tasks.description: Test theme::tests::test_parse_hex_color fails with wrong RGB value returned. Fix hex color parsing in theme module.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify test_parse_hex_color passes with correct RGB value
AddRegressionTest: ensure other theme parsing tests still pass
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-tui -- theme
tasks.impl_notes: Fix hex color parsing in crates/tui/src/theme.rs to return correct RGB value

tasks.title: Fix Desktop/Web Smoke Test Port Conflict
tasks.description: Test desktop_web_different_ports fails because it assumes specific port 3000 availability. Use dynamic port allocation instead of hardcoded port.
test_criteria: AddIntegrationTest: verify desktop_web_different_ports finds available port dynamically
AddRegressionTest: ensure desktop and web modes can start on different ports
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-cli -- desktop
tasks.impl_notes: Use dynamic port allocation in crates/cli/src/cmd/desktop.rs instead of hardcoded port 3000

tasks.title: Per-agent Model Override Testing
tasks.description: Implementation exists but not explicitly tested. Per-agent model override functionality needs dedicated test coverage.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify per-agent model override can be set
AddUnitTest: verify per-agent model override takes precedence over global setting
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-llm

tasks.title: Hidden vs Visible Agent UI Behavior Testing
tasks.description: Tests exist for invariant but UI behavior not critical. Hidden vs visible agent UI behavior needs verification.

AddUnitTest: verify visible agent appears in UI correctly
RunTestSuite: execute cargo test -p opencode-agent
